mapper.sql: delivery.paper_delivery_id, delivery.package_id, delivery.electorate_item_id, delivery.tenant_id, electorate.representative_opid, delivery.proxy_authorization_id, delivery.recipient_name, delivery.delivery_method, delivery.evidence_source_type, delivery.evidence_source_id, delivery.evidence_hash, delivery.delivered_by_user_id, delivery.delivered_at, delivery.status, delivery.reviewed_by_user_id, delivery.reviewed_at, delivery.review_note, delivery.unified_delivery_id, delivery.create_time, delivery.update_time, delivery.version

ballot.paper_ballot_id, ballot.package_id, ballot.electorate_item_id, ballot.tenant_id, electorate.representative_opid, ballot.proxy_authorization_id, ballot.ballot_number, ballot.template_hash, ballot.material_source_type, ballot.material_source_id, ballot.material_hash, ballot.received_by_user_id, ballot.received_at, ballot.status, ballot.voided_by_user_id, ballot.voided_at, ballot.void_reason, ballot.create_time, ballot.update_time, ballot.version
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_paper_ballot_entry_item ( entry_id, subject_id, determination, choice, invalid_reason_code, invalid_reason_description ) VALUES
(#{entryId}, #{item.subjectId}, #{item.determination}, #{item.choice}, #{item.invalidReasonCode}, #{item.invalidReasonDescription})
mapper.select: SELECT entry_id, paper_ballot_id, tenant_id, version_number, status, entered_by_user_id, entered_at, reviewed_by_user_id, reviewed_at, review_note FROM t_paper_ballot_entry WHERE paper_ballot_id = #{paperBallotId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY version_number DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT entry_item_id, entry_id, subject_id, determination, choice, invalid_reason_code, invalid_reason_description FROM t_paper_ballot_entry_item WHERE entry_id = #{entryId} ORDER BY subject_id

SELECT outcome.outcome_id, outcome.paper_ballot_id, outcome.entry_id, outcome.subject_id, outcome.status, outcome.unified_ballot_id, outcome.conflicting_ballot_id, outcome.reason, outcome.finalized_at FROM t_paper_ballot_outcome outcome JOIN t_paper_ballot ballot ON ballot.paper_ballot_id = outcome.paper_ballot_id WHERE outcome.paper_ballot_id = #{paperBallotId} AND ballot.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY outcome.subject_id

SELECT FROM t_paper_voting_delivery delivery JOIN t_voting_electorate_item_snapshot electorate ON electorate.snapshot_item_id = delivery.electorate_item_id WHERE delivery.package_id = #{packageId} AND delivery.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY delivery.delivered_at DESC, delivery.paper_delivery_id DESC

SELECT FROM t_paper_ballot ballot JOIN t_voting_electorate_item_snapshot electorate ON electorate.snapshot_item_id = ballot.electorate_item_id WHERE ballot.package_id = #{packageId} AND ballot.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY ballot.received_at DESC, ballot.paper_ballot_id DESC
